titleStmt.title: SII 27.369: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 369. (A.R. No. 482 of 1928-29.) UJRE, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Janārdanasvāmi temple.

The inscription states that Viṭharasa-oḍeya gave the village Ujiri as uṁbaḷi to Kāmirāya-arasa and Dēvaṇṇa-Kōṭhāri as a compensation for his (Viṭharasa's) having burnt their palace at Koḍeyāḷa and the village Nirumārga, and records the order the latter gave to the residents of that village regarding the payment of taxes which were to be thereafter paid to him.
It is dated Śaka 1391, Virōdhi, Śrāvaṇa śu. 3, Tuesday corresponding to 1469 A.D., July 11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiracuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1391 neya vartamāna virōdhi sa
ṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śudha 3 maṁlū Ujiriyada dēvaru śrīmanma
hāviṣṇuvina saṁnidhiyalū kāmirāya Arasaru dēvaṁṇa koṭhāri ya
rū Ujiriyada grāmadavarige barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanakramaveṁteṁ
dare vīrarsavoḍeyaru naṁma koḍeyāṟada Aramaneyanū nirumārgada
grāmavanū suṭṭukeḍsidalli niṁmagrāmavanu namage parihāravāgi Uṁ
baḷiya koṭṭa saṁmaṁdha Ā Uṁbaḷige nīu voḍaṁbaṭu naṁma baṁdu kaṁ
ḍalli nāvittaṁḍalu Ā Uṁbaḷiya haccikoṁḍu Ubhayavāgi nimage
barasikoṭa śilāśāsanada vivara pūrvamaryādeyali nīu Arasugaḷige
hesarsi koṭubaha kaṁdāyavanu naṁma Eraḍu bageya grāmada A
dhikārigaḷū pūrvamaryādeyali kaṁdāyada tōṭavanu māḍyi kaṁ
dāyada hesaraṇiya māḍisuvaru Ā hesaraṇi pramāṟina hoṁnanū naṁ
mma yeraḍu bageya Adhikārigaḷige nīusalisi nenepu sādhanavanū yisi
koṁbiri niṁma grāmadiṁda vobaru sa muttidare pūrvamaryādeyali
grāmada muttaru grāmadavare bāḷuviriniṁma grāmadoḷage naṁma yeraḍu ba
geya Ūroḷage Uḷaṁthāvarū hoṁnakoṭṭu Avara savanisibāḷuvaru Ā Aruvā
rigaḷa bāḷisuvarū nīve karttarallade Ā Aruvārigaḷu kayiyyali nāu ye
raḍu bageya kartarū patravanikikoṁḍu niṁma mēle Ottasalladu yī
grāmadoḷage Arasiṁge haravarisallidu ballāḷige bhāgasalla
du baṁṭaṁge jōḷa salladu yā grāmadiṁda Ārobbarū
tapu voppamāḍidu Uṁṭādare naṁma Eraḍu bageya Adhikārigaḷū
grāmaū voṁdāgi koḍi vicārsi nyāyadalli Uḷaṁthāvanū mugi
du nīu koṭaṁthādanu yīsikoḷuhavallade grāmada voḷagevoḷa
viha[ri ṇaḷu] Eḷa ḷa mārasalladu navage Arasugaḷu Uṁbaḷi
ya koḍuvalli paryaṁtada nivage Uḷaṁthā tēja māṁnyava naḍasikoṭṭu niṁ
ma kayyali sēse sidhāya Arasugaḷu yisi koṁḍu baṁdaru Ā maryādeyaliThe word Arasugaḷu is engraved above the line in smaller characters.
niṁma tējamāṁnyava naḍasikoṭṭu niṁmakayyali sidhāyava yīsi koṁ
ḍu baha[re* tappe]u yīgrāmadoḷage nāu yeraḍu bageU naḍedu hōgi kāda sa
lladu kāmirāya Arasarū devaṁṇakoṭhāriyarige barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada Okha
ṇeya vivara Ujireyadu Eṁṭūra grāmada sidhāyada hoṁnnu pari
kramadalli bahasidhāyada hoṁnnu Araḷiya sidhāyada hoṁnnu niḍugale su
ṁkada hoṁnnu muṁtāgi yellavanū lekkava māḍi namage nūrru hoṁnna
nū grāmada hoṁniṁda teradukoṁḍu mēlāda hoṁnanū yittaṁḍalu sariyāgi ha
cci koṁḍeU naṁma kotkaḍada Uṁbaḷiya sāmyava māḍikobade nāunīu voṁdā
gi Āguhaṇaneladiṁda veccisi Ā Uṁbaḷiya sādhyamamāḍikoṁḍu nāu
nīu yittaṁḍalu sariyāgi haccikoṁbeU yidakke nāu yittaṁḍalu ta
ppeu grāhamānavanu barasikoṭa śilāśāsanada vakhkhaṇege tappidavaru
Ujireyada śrīmahāviṣṇu koḍeyāḷiya śrīmahādēvaru yī yara
ḍustāvanū Aḷedadōṣake hōharu vāraṇāsiyali sahasrakapileya va
dhisida dōṣakke hōharu māḍida viśvāsakkū barada śilāśāsanakkū tappidavaru .
Digital edition of SII 27.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
